claim_ceiling: Runs a symbolic Lean proof-search lab over bounded public toy theorems with the installed Lean subprocess: an and/or candidate-tactic search, a forward oracle-leak firewall, a problem-id ablation, and a #print axioms cleanliness gate. It rejects forged or memorising scenarios by recomputation. Lean is an optional dependency: when the lean binary is absent the organ is locked and verifies nothing rather than faking a pass. It is not neural theorem proving, does not solve any open mathematical problem, does not forward oracle proof bodies, and does not authorize release or publication.
